sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27247" key="dioptrismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διοπτρ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n27247.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">use of the speculum,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.40</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
